summary: Horizontal video. A clipped cable-news interview (Newsmax / 'Bianca Across the Nation') in which Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaks about the March jobs report, saying '178,000 new jobs, we blew it out of the water'. It is a split-screen talking-head segment with news lower-thirds and a scrolling chyron about Iran. There is no music track.
notable_text: MARCH JOBS REPORT BEATS EXPECTATIONS; NEWSMAX; Bianca Across the Nation; DOL.GOV
